root.name: Cloaky Nereus
假隐跳涅鲁斯
root.description: 14k+ m³ transport fit with cloak trick

branch.alert: Gank warning! Extremely dangerous if misused, not recommended
强暴警告，操作不当极度危险，不建议使用
branch.fit: [Nereus] [low] Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II Expanded Cargohold II [med] 50MN Quad LiF Restrained Microwarpdrive Medium Shield Extender I Medium Shield Extender I Medium Shield Extender I Medium Shield Extender I [high] Improved Cloaking Device II [rig] Medium Cargohold Optimization I Medium Cargohold Optimization I Medium Cargohold Optimization I [cargo] Inertial Stabilizers II x3
